tasks.title: Fix scale conversion formula
tasks.description: Standardize to ONE scale formula across all files. Use: feet_per_pixel = (scale_inches_per_foot / 12.0) / actual_dpi. Remove hardcoded 96 DPI.
tasks.result: Created unified_transform.py with standardized scale formula and Y-axis handling. Updated ML MCP server to use it.

tasks.title: Fix Y-axis transformation
tasks.description: Standardize Y-axis: revit_y = (image_height - pixel_y) * scale. Remove all other flip methods. One approach everywhere.
tasks.result: Y-axis fix included in unified_transform.py - image_to_revit() uses (height - y) formula consistently.

tasks.title: Add wall clustering/merging
tasks.description: After Hough detection, merge wall segments within 5px tolerance. Connect endpoints. Reduce fragmentation.
tasks.result: Wall clustering integrated into server.py - merges fragmented segments, snaps endpoints, removes duplicates

tasks.title: Integrate WallValidator
tasks.description: Call WallValidator before sending to Revit. Filter out zero-length, duplicates, origin walls, invalid coords.
tasks.result: WallValidator module created with coordinate checks, length validation, duplicate detection. Integrated into get_revit_walls pipeline.

tasks.title: Add dimension sanity check
tasks.description: After extraction, verify room sizes are reasonable (100-5000 sqft). Flag if scale seems wrong.
tasks.result: Dimension sanity check added - analyzes wall bounding box, checks for negative coordinates, validates building footprint size, warns about unusual aspect ratios.
